information.en: Deep-learning QSM (iQSM+) reconstruction from multi-echo GRE magnitude/phase images.

regulatory_information.manufacturer_address: Kookaburra Circuit Lot 1, New Lambton Heights, NSW, AU, 2305
regulatory_information.safety_advices: Research use only. Not for diagnostic use.
regulatory_information.special_operating_instructions: Requires a multi-echo GRE acquisition with magnitude and phase image output.

information.en: Define the config to be executed by MRD server
Custom config file not listed in drop-down menu
Skull-strip the magnitude image with FSL's BET2 before QSM reconstruction, to crop the field of view to brain tissue and suppress non-brain background artifacts.
